textByHash.c301413d55e9d1c2a8a3245ca3a98c21c8b1cf78: Well we could always use a spare pair of hands!
textByHash.e24c079d92571f5862c48b12b104545872f1c302: Here, fill this barrel with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.
textByHash.80c4864688e5ad1084466572daf9051e6c0d4834: Just remember, I need them to be ripe. Generally, perfectly ripe grapes are full and vibrant. They'll shine in the sunlight more than others.
textByHash.5a83c80be216e6f4f3e8b70d413a50196867930e: Hopefully you know what you're doing now. Just fill this barrel with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.
textByHash.344cce249ee9f34c4bbca784c297be2511c3c954: We could always use a spare pair of hands! I have a grape barrel here for you, but you don't have enough room for it at the moment. Come back once you can carry it.
textByHash.07a23201ef8d9211c4ecb65e36567dcefa94eb46: You've already got that grape barrel I gave you. Fill it with four sets of ripe grapes and bring it back to me.
textByHash.fa22114101a5be3fa5631a0526914e786fda0b5d: Ah, you get used to it. Besides, I have a near-infinite supply of lukewarm grape juice to keep me hydrated!
textByHash.65d2ddb7a4976187939484ec6f07dab2f17fb7b3: Great work! Here, keep some grapes as payment.
textByHash.b3280ca158196a909b31eeb7c25b364248bc2001: Now, if you're up for it, I wouldn't say no to you filling the barrel up again.
